label: Clearbit
description: Enrich leads and accounts with person and company data using Clearbit (now HubSpot Breeze Intelligence).

form.title: Connect Clearbit
form.subtitle: Paste your Clearbit secret API key to start enriching contacts and companies.

methods.label: Secret API Key
methods.description: Paste your Clearbit secret key (sk_…) from the Clearbit dashboard. No OAuth setup required — the fastest way to get started.
methods.how_to:
## Find your Clearbit Secret API Key

1. Log in to your Clearbit account at [app.clearbit.com](https://app.clearbit.com).
2. Click your avatar or name in the top-right corner, then select **API**.
3. Under **API Keys**, locate your **Secret key** — it starts with `sk_`.
4. Click **Copy** next to the key.
5. Paste it into the **Secret API Key** field below and click **Save**.

## Notes

- Your secret key grants full API access to your Clearbit account. Keep it private and never share it.
- If you suspect the key has been exposed, go to the same **API** page and click **Regenerate** to issue a new one. Update the key in Anton afterward.
- Clearbit accounts migrated to HubSpot Breeze Intelligence still use the same `sk_…` key format and API endpoints.
- Free-tier accounts have rate limits; check your plan in the Clearbit dashboard under **Usage**.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: Secret API Key
fields.description: Your Clearbit secret key beginning with sk_. Found in app.clearbit.com → API → API Keys.

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: API Base URL
fields.description: Override only if you have a custom Clearbit endpoint. Leave blank to use the default.
